name: AI-Powered Tools
description: AI assistants for developers — explain code, generate SQL, debug errors, write commits, docs and tests, powered by a large language model.

tools.name: AI Form Builder
tools.description: 60+ ready-made forms from any country, or describe a custom form in any language. Edit, brand, sign, scan from image, download PDF.

tools.name: AI Code Explainer
tools.description: Paste code and get a plain-English explanation, with likely bugs flagged. Beginner or expert depth.

tools.name: AI SQL Query Generator
tools.description: Describe a query in English and get correct SQL for Postgres, MySQL, SQLite or T-SQL, explained back to you.

tools.name: AI Error Diagnoser
tools.description: Paste an error or stack trace and get the root cause plus the exact code fix as a diff.

tools.name: AI Code Review Assistant
tools.description: Get feedback on your code split into Security, Performance and Style sections.

tools.name: AI Regex Generator
tools.description: Turn a plain-English description into a working regular expression, with an explanation and examples.

tools.name: AI Commit Message Generator
tools.description: Turn a git diff into a clean commit message — Conventional Commits, Gitmoji or plain style.

tools.name: AI README Generator
tools.description: Generate a professional README.md from your project details, auto-detecting the stack from package.json.

tools.name: AI Test Case Generator
tools.description: Paste a function and get a thorough test suite for Jest, PyTest or JUnit covering edge cases.

tools.name: AI Docker Compose Generator
tools.description: Describe your services or pick a stack template (MERN, Laravel+MySQL+Redis, Django+Postgres) and get a valid docker-compose.yml.

tools.name: AI Cron Expression Explainer
tools.description: Convert plain English to a cron expression or explain any cron expression, with timezone-aware next run times.
